name: Convoso AI Outbound Contact Center API
what_it_does: AI-powered outbound contact center platform with REST API — providing predictive, power, and preview dialing modes with TCPA compliance tools, dynamic scripting, real-time agent management, caller ID health monitoring, CRM integrations, and machine learning to identify best call times for insurance, mortgage, education, and lead gen industries.
use_cases: Managing outbound dialing campaigns with dynamic lead lists via Convoso API
Querying agent performance and campaign metrics for operations reporting
Integrating Convoso call dispositions with CRM for lead status updates via webhook
Monitoring caller ID reputation health to maximize answer rates programmatically
Managing TCPA compliance settings and DNC lists via API for regulatory adherence
not_for: B2B SaaS SDR teams needing AI parallel dialing (use Orum or Nooks for modern AI dialers)
Inbound contact center routing (use Genesys or Five9 for inbound ACD)
Small teams under 10 agents (predictive dialing requires volume to optimize)
best_when: A high-volume outbound contact center in insurance, mortgage, education, or lead generation needs predictive dialing with TCPA compliance, caller ID health management, and ML-powered lead prioritization.
avoid_when: You're a B2B tech sales team, need modern AI-powered virtual sales floors, or have fewer than 10 agents making outbound calls.

auth.notes: API key authentication. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for call events, dispositions, and campaign events. Salesforce and HubSpot native integrations. TCPA compliance tools (time zone compliance, cell phone scrubbing, DNC integration). No OAuth2 for REST API.

pricing.notes: Los Angeles company. Founded 2013. Backed by private equity. Outbound contact center focus — high-volume regulated industries. Caller ID Health feature is key differentiator — monitors SPAM flagging by carriers. TCPA compliance suite built in. ML-based DynamIQ lead prioritization. Primarily serving insurance, solar, education, and mortgage verticals. STIR/SHAKEN call authentication compliance.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for campaigns, leads, agents, and reporting. API key auth. Moderate documentation. TCPA compliance tools require proper configuration. Caller ID Health monitoring is key feature — requires API monitoring for proactive management. Webhook for call disposition. ML lead prioritization not directly configurable via API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Campaign reads idempotent. Lead reads idempotent. Lead upload not idempotent — check by phone number before adding.
known_agent_gotchas: TCPA compliance mandatory — time zone compliance, cell phone scrubbing, DNC registry required
Caller ID SPAM flagging by carriers degrades answer rates — monitor caller ID health
STIR/SHAKEN authentication required for branded calling — additional setup
Predictive dialing abandonment rate must stay below 3% per TCPA regulations
Annual contract — validate ROI with current outbound volume before commitment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and CCPA compliant. US data residency. API key auth. TCPA compliance critical — FCC fines for violations are significant. Consumer phone data requires DNC scrubbing before each campaign. Call recording storage — follow state-specific recording consent laws. CCPA applies to California consumer data.
